meta.description: Officer email templates for criminal practice. All built-in wording is placeholder-driven. Logic should only load subject/body and apply placeholders.
notes: Do not hard-code sentence fragments in JS.
If a placeholder value is missing, render as empty string.

templates.name: Request for Bail / Case Reference Confirmation

first_attendance.subject: {{clientName}} - {{station}} - Disclosure Request
first_attendance.body:
Dear DC {{oicName}},

I am writing in relation to {{clientName}}, who is due to attend at {{station}} on {{date}} at {{time}} for a {{attendanceType}} interview in connection with {{offenceType}}.

Please would you provide disclosure in advance of the interview, including the nature of the allegation, the circumstances relied upon, and the key evidence said to support it.

Please also confirm that the attendance remains effective.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

follow_up.subject: {{clientName}} - {{station}} - Outcome Request
follow_up.body:
Dear DC {{oicName}},

I write following my attendance on behalf of {{clientName}} at {{station}} on {{date}}.

Please would you confirm the outcome of the matter, including whether {{clientName}} was released under investigation, released on police bail, charged, or otherwise dealt with.

If bail was imposed, please confirm the bail return date, time, and any conditions.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

no_reply.subject: {{clientName}} - {{station}} - Further Chaser
no_reply.body:
Dear DC {{oicName}},

I refer to my previous email regarding {{clientName}} and should be grateful for your response.

Please would you confirm the present position in this matter, together with any bail date, bail conditions, or other next step.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

bail_details_after_interview.subject: {{clientName}} - {{station}} - Bail Details Request
bail_details_after_interview.body:
Dear DC {{oicName}},

I am writing in relation to {{clientName}}, a client who was detained at {{station}} on {{date}} under custody record number {{ourFileNumber}}. The DSCC reference is {{ufn}}.

We understand {{clientName}} was released on police bail. Please could you confirm the bail return date, time, and any bail conditions imposed.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

voluntary_interview_disclosure.subject: {{clientName}} - {{station}} - Voluntary Interview Disclosure
voluntary_interview_disclosure.body:
Dear DC {{oicName}},

I act for {{clientName}} in respect of the voluntary interview arranged for {{date}} at {{time}} at {{station}}.

Please would you provide disclosure in advance, including the allegation under investigation, a summary of the factual basis of the complaint, and the principal evidence relied upon.

Please also confirm that the interview remains listed for that date and time.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

custody_disclosure_request.subject: {{clientName}} - {{station}} - Custody Disclosure Request
custody_disclosure_request.body:
Dear DC {{oicName}},

I act for {{clientName}}, who is presently at {{station}} in connection with {{offenceType}}.

Please would you provide disclosure as soon as possible, including the nature of the allegation, the material facts relied upon, and the key evidence said to support the suspicion.

If interview is proposed, please also indicate the likely timescale.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

pre_interview_chase.subject: {{clientName}} - {{station}} - Urgent Disclosure Chase
pre_interview_chase.body:
Dear DC {{oicName}},

I refer to the interview of {{clientName}} listed for {{date}} at {{time}} at {{station}}.

I should be grateful if you would now provide disclosure to this email address so that proper advice may be taken before interview.

Please also confirm that the interview is proceeding as planned.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

rui_update_request.subject: {{clientName}} - Request for Update
rui_update_request.body:
Dear DC {{oicName}},

I write on behalf of {{clientName}} to request an update in relation to the above matter.

Please would you confirm the current status of the investigation, whether any further action is anticipated, and whether there is any proposed next step.

If there is to be a further attendance or interview, please provide the proposed date, time, and location.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

file_reference_request.subject: {{clientName}} - Reference Confirmation Request
file_reference_request.body:
Dear DC {{oicName}},

I write in relation to {{clientName}} concerning the above matter.

For file administration purposes, please would you confirm the custody record number, crime reference number, and any bail reference applicable to this case.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}
